name: Reporting timestamp
description: Date and time of submission of the report to the TR
validation_rule: Must be a valid UTC timestamp in ISO 8601 format

name: Report submitting entity
description: LEI of the entity submitting the report
validation_rule: Must be a valid LEI format

name: Sector of the reporting counterparty
description: Nature of the reporting counterparty business activities
validation_rule: If field 4 is F, at least one value from FC taxonomy required

name: Branch of the reporting counterparty
description: Country of the branch through which the SFT is executed
validation_rule: Must be a valid ISO country code

name: Side of the counterparty
validation_rule: Must be GIVE or TAKE. Mirror field: counterparties report opposite values

name: Other counterparty
description: LEI or client code of the other counterparty
validation_rule: Must be a valid LEI or client code

name: Country of the other counterparty
description: Country code of the other counterparty
validation_rule: Must be a valid ISO country code

name: Beneficiary
description: LEI or client code of the beneficiary if different
validation_rule: Required if beneficiary differs from reporting counterparty

name: Tri-party agent
validation_rule: Must be valid LEI if populated

name: Broker
description: LEI of the broker that intermediated the SFT
validation_rule: Must be valid LEI if populated

name: CSD participant or indirect participant
description: LEI or BIC of the CSD participant
validation_rule: Must be valid LEI or BIC if populated

name: Agent lender
validation_rule: Required for securities lending where an agent acts on behalf

name: UTI
validation_rule: Must be unique, max 52 alphanumeric characters

name: Event date
description: Date on which the reportable event took place

name: Type of SFT
validation_rule: Must be one of REPO, BSB, SL, ML

name: Cleared
description: Whether the SFT was centrally cleared

name: Clearing timestamp
description: Time and date when clearing took place

name: CCP
description: LEI of the CCP that cleared the SFT

name: Trading venue
validation_rule: Must be valid MIC code or XXXX for OTC

name: Master agreement version
description: Year of the master agreement version

name: Execution timestamp
description: Date and time of execution of the SFT

name: Value date (Start date)
description: Settlement date of the opening leg

name: Maturity date (End date)
description: Settlement date of the closing leg
validation_rule: Must be a valid date or open for open-ended SFTs

name: Termination date
description: Actual termination date if different from maturity

name: Minimum notice period
description: Min business days for notice before termination
validation_rule: Must be a positive integer if populated

name: Earliest call-back date
description: Earliest date lender can call back securities

name: Method used to provide collateral
validation_rule: Must be TTCA, SICA, or OTH

name: Open term
description: Whether SFT is open term (no fixed maturity)

name: Termination optionality
validation_rule: Must be EGRN, ETSB, or NOAP

name: Fixed rate
description: Fixed rate of the repo or lending fee

name: Day count convention
description: Day count convention for fixed rate
validation_rule: Must be valid day count convention code

name: Floating rate
validation_rule: Must be a valid benchmark rate identifier

name: Floating rate reference period - time period
description: Time period for floating rate reference
validation_rule: Must be valid time period code

name: Floating rate payment frequency - time period
validation_rule: Must be valid time period code

name: Floating rate reset frequency - time period
validation_rule: Must be valid time period code

name: Spread
description: Spread over/under floating rate in basis points

name: Lending fee / Margin lending rate
description: Fee or rate for securities/margin lending

name: Exclusive arrangements
description: Whether lending is on exclusive terms
validation_rule: Must be true or false if populated

name: Outstanding margin loan
description: Total value of the outstanding margin loan
validation_rule: Must be a positive numeric amount

name: Base currency of outstanding margin loan
description: Currency of the outstanding margin loan
validation_rule: Must be a valid ISO 4217 currency code

name: Short market value
description: Market value of the short position

name: Principal amount on value date
description: Cash value to be settled on value date
validation_rule: Must be a positive numeric amount

name: Principal amount on maturity date
description: Cash value to be settled on maturity date
validation_rule: Must be a positive numeric amount

name: Principal amount currency
validation_rule: Must be valid ISO 4217 currency code

name: Type of asset
description: Type of security or commodity as collateral
validation_rule: Must be SECU, COMM, or CASH

name: Security identifier
validation_rule: Must be a valid ISIN if field 39 is SECU

name: Classification of a security
validation_rule: Must be a valid 6-character CFI code

name: Security quality
validation_rule: Must be INVG, NIVG, NOTR or NOAP

name: Issuer jurisdiction
validation_rule: Must be a valid country code

name: LEI of the issuer
description: LEI of the issuer of the security

name: Collateral basket identifier
validation_rule: Must be a valid ISIN if populated

name: Action type
format: NEWT, MODI, VALU, COLU, EROR, CORR, ETRM, POSC
validation_rule: Must be a valid action type

name: Collateral market value
validation_rule: Must be a positive numeric amount

name: Collateral component type
description: Type of collateral: security, cash, commodity
validation_rule: Must be SECU, CASH, or COMM

name: Further sub product (collateral)
description: Further sub product for commodity collateral

name: Collateral quality
validation_rule: Must be INVG, NIVG, NOTR or NOAP

name: Settlement venue
description: MIC of settlement venue for collateral

name: Principal amount on value date (Leg 2)
description: Principal for second leg of BSB

name: Principal amount currency (Leg 2)
description: Currency of second leg for BSB
validation_rule: Must be valid ISO 4217 for BSB

name: Security identifier (Leg 2)
description: ISIN for second leg of BSB
validation_rule: Must be valid ISIN for BSB leg 2

name: Type of collateral component (Leg 2)
description: Collateral type for second leg of BSB
validation_rule: Must be SECU, CASH, or COMM

name: Termination optionality (SL)
validation_rule: Must be EGRN, ETSB, or NOAP

name: Other type of collateral
description: Free text for other collateral types

name: Funding sources
description: Whether securities obtained through SFT for on-lending

name: Trading venue of the security
description: MIC of venue where security is traded

name: CFI code of the security
description: CFI code of the underlying security

name: Type of margin transaction
description: Whether margin is posted or received
validation_rule: Must be MRGG or MRGE. Mirror field.

name: Excess collateral posted
description: Value of collateral posted in excess

name: Excess collateral received
description: Value of collateral received in excess

name: Short sell indicator
description: Whether lent security used for short selling
validation_rule: Must be true or false, SL only

name: Total value of margin posted
description: Total value of all margin posted

name: Total value of margin received
description: Total value of all margin received

name: Margin lending provided to counterparty
validation_rule: Must be positive numeric, ML only

name: Currency of margin lending
validation_rule: Must be valid ISO 4217, ML only

name: Reinvested cash rate of return
description: Rate of return on reinvested cash

name: Reinvestment type
description: Type of reinvestment of cash collateral
validation_rule: Must be MMFT, OTHR, REPO, SDPU, or SSEC

name: Funding source type
description: Type of funding used to finance SFT

name: Funding source market value
description: Market value of the funding source

name: Counterparty for reuse
description: LEI of counterparty for collateral reuse
